input.testCaseTitle: After creating the product,By default SAG code is not showing.
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-181 reported defect: After creating the product,By default SAG code is not showing.
input.errorMessage: After creating the product,By default SAG code is not showing.

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Newly created products did not default-populate the SAG code. The expected SAG value was not being derived or displayed from the selected product data until the fix was verified.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.72. code-bug is acceptable because the defect may be in form data-binding rather than the underlying data.
